scripts.lint: uv run flake8 packages tests scripts && uv run pylint packages/skim-core/src/skim_core packages/skim-cli/src/skim_cli scripts && turbo run lint
scripts.test: uv run pytest tests -q && turbo run test
scripts.format: uv run black packages tests scripts --config pyproject.toml && uv run isort packages tests scripts --settings-path pyproject.toml && turbo run format
